h2: Chris Elmore MP visits Infinite Renewables, Bridgend highlighting Welsh innovation in wind power…
h2: Constituents from Bridgend & Porthcawl visit Parliament…
pages.text_excerpt: About Chris - Chris Elmore MP Skip to main content Chris Elmore MP MP for Bridgend & Porthcawl About Chris Social Media Survey Funding Advice Day Info Pack Contact Latest news... Monthly Report Am I your MP? Upcoming Advice Surgeries Annual Report 2024/2025 Business of the Week! Privacy Policy More Menu About Chris Hi, I'm Chris Elmore, I'm your Labour MP for Bridgend & Porthcawl. I’ve lived in South Wales all my life, and Brynmenyn is where my wife, young son, and I call home. I’m proud to represent our area in Westminster and to work alongside local people, organisations, and businesses to help make our communities stronger, more connected, and better for everyone. For me, being your MP isn’t just about politics, it’s about supporting the people who make our towns and villages what they are. Before coming to Parliament, I worked in further education, office management, and public affairs. I also served as a County Councillor and Cabinet Member in the Vale of Glamorgan, leading on Education and Children’s Social Services, and spent time as an independent member of the Cardiff and Vale Health Board. A lesser known fact is that my first job was as a butcher, which helped teach me the value of hard work, honesty, and community. I care deeply about backing local people, businesses, and charities, and about making sure our communities have the support and resources they need to thrive. Whether it’s helping families, supporting schools, protecting the environment, or championing local businesses, my goal is always the same: to listen, stand up for the area, and do what I can to make Bridgend & Porthcawl an even stronger, fairer place to live and work. Click here to get in touch Chris Elmore MP Follow me on social media for regular updates: The Bridgend & Porthcawl Constituency Latest news... pages.title: Social Media Consultation… - Chris Elmore MP
pages.text_excerpt: Social Media Consultation… - Chris Elmore MP Skip to main content Chris Elmore MP MP for Bridgend & Porthcawl About Chris Social Media Survey Funding Advice Day Info Pack Contact Latest news... Monthly Report Am I your MP? Upcoming Advice Surgeries Annual Report 2024/2025 Business of the Week! Privacy Policy More Menu 6th March, 2026 Social Media Consultation… The UK Government is currently considering new steps to help protect children and young people from harm online. As part of this work, a national consultation is exploring a range of options — including the possibility of introducing restrictions on social media use for those under the age of 16. As these discussions move forward, it is important that the views of local communities are heard. I am particularly keen to hear from parents, carers and young people across Bridgend & Porthcawl about what these potential changes might mean in practice and whether you believe they would make a difference. Your feedback will help ensure that local perspectives are included in the national conversation about how best to keep children safe online while supporting young people to use digital spaces responsibly. If you have a few moments to spare, please consider sharing your views by completing my short survey by clicking the link below. 👉 Click here to take part in the survey 👈 Social Media Consultation Chris Elmore MP Contact details 33 Caroline Street, Bridgend CF31 1DW, UK View on Google Maps Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by Carys Price on behalf of Chris Elmore both at 33 Caroline Street, Bridgend, CF31 1DW. ©2026 Copyright Chris Elmore MP/Labour All rights reserved.
